title: pedicularis rhinanthoides subsp. labellata
intro: Pedicularis rhinanthoides subsp. labellata, also known as the monkey flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the traditional Chinese medicine system, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pedicularis rhinanthoides subsp. labellata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to promote sweat and relieve congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy among practitioners of traditional Chinese medicine.
